# Round Type Institute Academic Program Quota Seat Gender Open Close
How the match works: shows every seat where your rank qualifies — closing rank ≥ your rank − 5% (small reach allowed). When more than 500 seats qualify, only the 500 sharpest cutoffs are shown — narrow further with the filters above. Quotas (HS / OS / AI / GO / JK / LA) are auto-gated against your home state. Sub-quotas — GGSIPU (Defence / Jain / Kashmiri / Sikh), JAC (Defence / Single Girl / Kashmiri Migrant), UPTAC (AF / TF / FF) — are gated against the Sub-quota field. Pick "None" to see general seats only, or your reservation to also see those reserved-pool seats; the small purple tags on rows tell you which pool a seat belongs to. Sources: JoSAA · CSAB · UPTAC · GGSIPU · JAC Delhi.
Disclaimer — The cutoff numbers shown here are scraped from publicly available official sources (JoSAA, CSAB, UPTAC, GGSIPU, JAC Delhi). They can contain errors, OCR misreads, or stale rounds, and counselling rules change every cycle. This tool is informational only and is not affiliated with any counselling authority — always verify cutoffs and your own eligibility on the official portals before locking your choices.
